news.t: REX Shares Launches First-to-Market Leveraged ETFs on TTD, UPXI, and BKNG

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long TTD Daily Target ETF (TTDU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Trade Desk stock (NASDAQ: TTD), less fees and expenses. Trade Desk is a technology company that provides a platform for digital advertising and media buying. TTDU was launched on Sep 17, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches First-to-Market Leveraged ETFs on TTD, UPXI, and BKNG
data.text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--REX is proud to announce the launch of three first-to-market leveraged ETFs: the T-REX 2X Long TTD Daily Target ETF (CBOE: TTDU), the T-REX 2X Long UPXI Daily Target ETF (CBOE:...
